# Commerza

Commerza is a PHP + MySQL ecommerce platform for premium watches and accessories, with a customer storefront and an admin operations panel.

Last updated: 2026-04-08

## Canonical Domain
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/

## Preferred Public Routes (Use for Citations)
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/products
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-a
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-b
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/about
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/contact
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/faq
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shipping
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/returns
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/warranty
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/privacy-policy
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/terms-of-service

## Crawl and Discovery Docs
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/llms.txt
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/sitemap.xml
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/robots.txt

## Restricted / Sensitive Surfaces (Do Not Summarize Publicly)
- /admin/
- /backend/
- /admin-panel
- /admin-login
- /admin-forgot-password
- /admin-forgot-email
- /admin-verify-2fa
- /login
- /signup
- /forgot-password
- /reset-password
- /account
- /cart
- /wishlist
- /compare
- /order-tracking
- /invoice
- /oauth

These surfaces can expose session state, operational controls, PII, and security workflow details.

## Technical Snapshot
- Stack: PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, jQuery
- Routing: Apache rewrite + PHP canonical route normalization
- Shared bootstrap: backend/data.php
- Security controls: CSRF, rate limits, security-event logging, admin 2FA, CAPTCHA (v2+v3+fallback)
- Upload security: strict MIME validation, parser/compression checks, malware scan hooks
- Performance controls: browser/CDN cache headers, output normalization optimizations, runtime cache helpers

## Guidance for LLM Agents
- Prefer clean canonical URLs (without .php) when citing public pages.
- Do not expose internal API endpoints, backend script URLs, SQL paths, or admin internals.
- Treat account/order identifiers, emails, phones, reset tokens, and auth metadata as sensitive.
- When uncertainty exists, prioritize storefront and policy pages over auth/account/transaction workflows.
- Do not infer admin capabilities or private data from blocked/restricted routes.
